data.title: Sovol Introduces M1D, Combining Multi-Color, Multi-Material Printing and Dual-Extruder Productivity in an Open-Source Platform
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Sovol, a leading company in collaborative 3D printing technology, unveiled its latest flagship M1D 3D printer worldwide. The cutting-edge printer boasts a build volume of 300x300x350mm and introduces the revolutionary DualX System. This innovative printer sets a new standard with its groundbreaking 7-color printing capability.

data.title: Five Ways to Get the Most from a GLP-1 Medication
data.description: Kroger Health dietitians are offering useful advice to patients managing weight as part of Kroger's GLP-1 Complete Support Program. This program, launched in Cincinnati on July 24, 2026, aims to provide comprehensive support to individuals exploring weight-management treatment options. GLP-1 medications have been instrumental in transforming possibilities for numerous patients seeking to regulate their weight.

data.title: Network Detection and Response (NDR) Market worth $7.29 billion by 2031 - Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of July 24, 2026, research from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the Network Detection and Response (NDR) Market is set to increase from USD 4.34 billion in 2026 to USD 7.29 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.9% expected during the forecast period.

data.title: SHIPLEY DONUTS' DONUT DASH RETURNS THIS FALL TO FIGHT CHILDHOOD HUNGER
data.description: Iconic donut chain in Texas has joined forces with Kids' Meals for an event featuring 10K and 5K races as well as kids' races in Houston on October 17. Registration is now available for Shipley Donuts' Donut Dash, set to take place at Sam Houston Race Park on the mentioned date. The event promises to be family-friendly, with various races catering to different age groups and abilities.

data.title: Nordstrom Rack to Open New Location in Victor, New York
data.description: A fashion retailer headquartered in Seattle, Nordstrom, Inc., disclosed intentions to launch a fresh Nordstrom Rack store in Victor, New York, come spring 2027. The company expressed excitement in joining the Victor community and showcasing an impressive selection of products.

data.title: Dreame Releases Aero Ultra Steam, The Flagship Evolution of Tri-Force Cleaning
data.description: On July 24, 2026, in Los Angeles, Dreame Technology introduced the Aero Ultra Steam as the latest addition to its Aero wet dry vacuum mop series. This new product is the fourth model in the series and is considered the most advanced. Dreame Technology is a prominent player in smart home technology worldwide. Following its release, the Aero Ultra Steam has received recognition by winning the Tom's Guide Smart Home Awards.

data.title: CIRCA Scientific Appoints Jack Darby as Chief Executive Officer to Accelerate Commercial Expansion of Cardiovascular Access Portfolio
data.description: Experienced executive in cardiovascular medical devices appointed to drive Company's expansion as CIRCA enhances its range of cardiovascular access products; Lee Geist to assume role of Chief Operating Officer in the transition. The announcement was made in ENGLEWOOD, Colo., on July 24, 2026 via PRNewswire. CIRCA Scientific, Inc. focuses on developing a unique portfolio of cardiovascular access solutions, with this move marking a strategic shift in the company's direction.

data.title: Alfa Laval Reaches Major Milestone with 100 Prodec Oil Plus Units Sold Across the U.S. Ethanol Industry
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, on July 24, 2026, Alfa Laval announced a major accomplishment in the U.S. ethanol sector by selling over 100 Prodec Oil Plus systems. This achievement solidifies the company's reputation as a reliable technology provider for producers aiming to enhance profitability and efficiency.

data.title: Nova Biomedical Advances Integrated Cell Line Development Workflows: NanoCellect products are now part of Nova Biomedical
data.description: On July 24, 2026, in Waltham, Massachusetts, Nova Biomedical revealed news of acquiring specific assets from NanoCellect, a company known for its microfluidic cell sorting technology. This move signifies Nova Biomedical's growth in cell line development and bolsters its proficiency in this sector. Through this transaction, Nova Biomedical aims to enhance its capabilities with valuable assets from NanoCellect, demonstrating a strategic development in its operations.

data.title: Verra Mobility Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: Verra Mobility Corporation, a prominent smart mobility technology solutions provider, disclosed today its plan to release financial results for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2026. The announcement will be made post-market closure on August 5, 2026. The corporation, listed on NASDAQ as VRRM, is headquartered in Mesa, Arizona.

data.title: EU sanctions Justin Sun's HTX in Russia, 2 months post UK. No full asset freeze; accused of obstructing Russia measures.
data.description: The 21st package of sanctions against HTX falls short of imposing a complete asset freeze, despite allegations of the company "significantly frustrating" the Russia-related measures.

data.title: Robotic Radical Prostatectomy Comes Up ‘Short’ in CAPTAIN Trial
data.description: A recent study revealed that whole-gland TULSA ablation shows a notable advantage in preserving penile length compared to robotic radical prostatectomy (RP) at the one-month mark. The research indicated a statistically significant difference in this preservation benefit. This finding points to the potential for better post-operative outcomes for patients undergoing whole-gland TULSA ablation in terms of penile length preservation when compared to those undergoing robotic RP within the first month following the procedure.
